scope: Large board-impact batch covering the next 50 pending players after batch 013, excluding prior research rows and rows without a confirmed current team in the local projection export.
method: Skip rows already present in earlier player research batches.
Skip rows whose current-team field is blank in the projection export.
Prioritize remaining pending rows by historical rating, then continue into no-history newcomer rows when the historical queue is exhausted.
Use local player-type, class, historical anchor, and current-team context for initial scoring.
Calculate projected BBPR with the same shared calibration used by the projection apply path.
Keep every row pending admin approval so official roster, signing, and role evidence can be reviewed before application.

formulas.projectedBbprWithHistory: shared calibrateProjectedBbpr(player, suggested) logic used by admin apply path

teamContextRubric.projectedStarter: Yes requires returner/transfer profile plus a plausible path to starter or closing-lineup minutes; Uncertain means rotation value without locked starting signal; No means depth/bench role.
teamContextRubric.projectedRole: 86-88 for plausible starter/closing cases in this lower-history range, 80-85 for high-minute rotation players, 74-79 for uncertain rotation players with role caps.
teamContextRubric.opportunityChange: Rewards open usage, transfer fit, or retained-program opportunity; penalizes crowded high-major rotations and uncertain immediate translation.
teamContextRubric.offensiveBurden: Primary/secondary scorers and creators get 82+; defensive bigs, connectors, and low-usage wings stay lower.
teamContextRubric.roleEvidence: Every row includes why starter credit was assigned or capped and remains pending for official verification.

players.researchSummary: Wesley Yates III carries a 25.2526 anchor into a major-rotation projection for Washington. The batch uses the same projection inputs and shared BBPR calibration as applied rows, while keeping the row pending for official role, health, and depth-chart review.

teamContext.starterEvidence: Washington returner profile in the local projection export gives him a retained-program context, with exact lineup standing still pending roster/depth review.
teamContext.roleCap: Score keeps starter status uncertain, emphasizing playable rotation value without over-crediting usage.
teamContext.positionCompetition: Washington's G minutes should be reviewed against returning contributors, portal additions, and freshmen before applying the suggestion.

evidence.notes: Official roster/signing page is the primary verification target for Wesley Yates III's Washington status and role context.
Source row 260 lists Wesley Yates III as a Returning Jr G with historical rating 25.2526.
